nasb.text: When evening came, after the sun had set, they began bringing to Him all who were ill and those who were demon-possessed.

esv.text: That evening at sundown they brought to him all who were sick or oppressed by demons.

cnv.text: 到了黃昏，有人不斷把生病的和被鬼附的，都帶到耶穌面前。

ccb.text: 日落之后，有人把病人和被鬼附身的人都带来见耶稣。

csbs.text: 到了傍晚，日落的时候，人们带着所有患病的、有鬼魔附身的，到耶稣那里去。
